subcodes.first_line: O thou who drinkest from the chalice of My loving-kindness, who circlest round the sanctuary of My will, and who hast turned toward the Kaaba of My beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الشارب من کاس عنایتی و الطائف حول ارادتی و المقبل الی کعبه جمالی و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
